raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rungs/ un wiſs Iſraëſka Namē/ 
las winnu Starpā.
Itt kà es fcho Naſtu neſlu, tà taps tas
Jerusalemes Kehninsch aiswests.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sakki: Es eſmu juhfu
Brihnuns/ itt kà es eſmu dar-
rijs/ tà taps winneem darrhts/
tee aisees/ un taps Zeetumá
westi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tag Leels-Rungs/ kaſ
winno Widdū irr/ neſthe(tohs
Ricēus) us Plezzahm Pa-
krehſlibā/ un aisees/ tee rakṣ
zaur Seenu/ zaue winnu ko lab
isnest/ winza Waigs taps ap-
ſegts/ tadeht ka winnam ar Az-
zim to Semmi ne buhs redſeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir es teplehtischu faun
Tihkli pahr winnu/ ka winſch
mannōs Walgōs tohp guh-
ſtihts/ un es weddischu winnu
us Babeli to Katdeētu Semmē/
ir to paſchu winſch ue redſebs/
bet tur nomtrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſus/ kaſ apkahrt
winnu par Paligu irr/ un wiſus
winna Prederrigus/ iſkaifschu
es wiſſōs Wehjōs/ un iſwilkſchu
winneem pakkat to Sohbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fajuttihs tee/ ka es tag
RUNGS eſmu/ kad es tohs
starp teem Paganeem iſwaia-
ſchu/ un tohs Walſis iſkaifi-
ſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr es atlizzinaſchu
no teem ne dauds Zilwekus no
Sohbina/ no Badda un no
Mehra/ tadeht ka tee winno Ne-
gantibas stahsta starp teem Pa-
ganeem/ kurp tee nahrs/ un tee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to notikke ta RUN-
ga Wahrds us man/ kaſ fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ tew
buhs tawu Maist ehst ar Dreb-
beſchanas/ un tawu Uhdeni ar
Trihzefchanu un Behdahm dsert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs us teem
Gaudim tahs Semmes fazzihrt:
Ta fakka tas Klungs RUNGS
no teem Jerusalemes Gedſihwo-
tajeem ceſsch tahs Iſraëta Sem-
mes: Tee ehdihs faunu Maist ar
Behdahm/ un dsers faunu Uhde-
ni ar Strd-Ehsteem/ tadeht ka
winnu Semme taps pohtā no
fawas Pilnibas/ ta Warras-
Darba deht wiſsu/ kaſ eeſsch
tahs dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Pilsfahti/ kaſ ee-
dſihwoti tohp/ ktuhſt pohtā/un
ta Semme buhs par pohtu
Weetu/ un juhs fajuttifeet/ ka
es tas RUNGS etmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atkat notikke ta KUN-
GA Wahrds us man/ kaſ fazz-
zija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ kaſ
tag irr par fakkamu Wahrdu
jums eeſsch Iſraëta Semmes?
ka juhs fakkat: Tas Laiks ilgt
pawelkahs/ un wiſa Parahdi-
ſčana ne buhs ueneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht fakki us teem:
Ta fakka tas Klungs RUNGS:
Es tikſchu ſcho fakkamo Wahr-
du mittetees/ ka to par fakkamo
Wahrdu ne buhs wairš walkaht
eeſsch Iſraëta. Bet runna us
Ji teem;
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
